overall.description: First-person video game footage depicting a player character moving from a dark sandy beach into coastal waters, swimming through waves past rocky formations and wooden vessels in a moody, overcast maritime environment with distinctive teal-blue lighting and atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark beach with beached wooden vessel

events.description: moving from dry sand into shallow water along the shoreline

agents.ego_description: walking along the dark beach toward the water's edge, passing wooden debris and a large beached ship

entered.detail: large wooden vessel with ornate carved stern beached on the shoreline
dark rocky cliff face forming the coastline boundary
reddish-brown sand mixed with wooden planks and debris

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark beach at night, with the camera moving along the shoreline past a large wooden ship beached on the right. The terrain features reddish sand mixed with debris, bounded by rocky cliffs on the left. Around the 8-second mark, the camera enters the shallow water, transitioning from walking to wading.

events.description: transition from walking to swimming as the water depth increases

agents.ego_description: swimming through choppy waves away from the shore into open water, heading toward distant rocky formations

entered.detail: choppy water surface with white foam and ripples
rocky outcrop visible on the horizon against the dark sky
distant vessel with orange fire illumination visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from walking to swimming as it moves into deeper water, leaving the beach behind. The scene opens up to a wide expanse of dark ocean with choppy waves. A rocky island and a distant burning ship become visible on the horizon, while the coastal cliffs recede to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal waters with large formations

events.description: approaching large rocky outcrops and cliffs rising from the water

agents.ego_description: swimming toward rocky formations with a distant burning ship visible, navigating through open coastal waters

entered.detail: tall dark rock formation rising prominently from the water surface
steep rocky cliff face approaching on the right side

segments.scene_description: Swimming through open waters, the camera approaches large rocky formations rising from the sea. The distant island draws closer while the burning ship moves to the left of the frame. Large rocky cliffs emerge on the right side as the camera navigates through the coastal rock formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: close to large wooden vessel with rigging

events.description: approaching large wooden ship with mast and rigging
passing the ship and approaching shore with wooden stakes

agents.ego_description: swimming close to a large wooden vessel with tall mast, then past it toward a shore lined with wooden stakes

entered.detail: large wooden vessel with tall mast and rigging ropes floating in the water
wooden mast with crossbeam and ropes extending overhead
wooden posts sticking out of the water near the approaching shore

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and passes close to a large wooden ship with a prominent mast and rigging. After passing the vessel, the scene transitions toward a shore marked by wooden stakes protruding from the water. The rocky formations recede into the background as the camera moves into shallower water near the shore.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a dark, debris-strewn beach into the choppy waters of a moody coastal environment. It begins by moving along a shoreline of reddish sand past a large beached wooden ship and rocky cliffs before wading into the shallow surf. As the camera transitions from walking to swimming, the scene opens into a wide expanse of dark ocean where a rocky island and a distant burning ship emerge on the horizon. The movement then carries the camera through open water toward towering rocky formations, navigating past a second wooden ship with prominent rigging. Finally, the rocky cliffs recede into the background as the camera glides toward a shallow shore marked by wooden stakes protruding from the water.
